title: Define JournalEntry types per ADR-005
description: Create JournalEntry enum with Run, Sleep, WaitForSignal, GetState, SetState, Choice, Parallel, Complete, Error variants. Implement JournalEntry::from_output and entry lookup methods.

preconditions: P1: Serialization must work for all JournalEntry variants
P2: Journal storage (sled) must be available
postconditions: Q1: JournalEntry can be serialized/deserialized to Vec<u8>
Q2: All ADR-005 entry types are representable
invariants: I2: Entries maintain ordering for replay

title: Define RunFuture and DurableFuture types
description: Create RunFuture<T> wrapping future with journal replay capability. Create DurableFuture<O> for state operations. Both must support journal integration and suspension/resumption.

preconditions: P1: Inner future must be Send + 'static
P2: Output T must be Serialize + DeserializeOwned
postconditions: Q1: RunFuture::new creates a runnable future with name
Q2: DurableFuture supports poll/resume semantics

title: Define DurableContext trait
description: Define the DurableContext trait with run, get_state, set_state, sleep, wait_for_signal, signal, rand_uuid methods. Include documentation per ADR-004 state types.

preconditions: P1: All methods must be idempotent or journaled
P2: Duration for sleep must be <= 24 hours (ADR-004)
postconditions: Q1: run() returns RunFuture<T> where T: Serialize + DeserializeOwned
Q2: get_state returns DurableFuture<Option<T>>
Q3: set_state returns DurableFuture<()>
Q4: sleep returns DurableFuture<()>
Q5: wait_for_signal returns DurableFuture<T>
Q6: signal has no return (fire-and-forget)
invariants: I1: All durable operations are journaled before returning
I2: UUID generation uses cryptographically secure RNG

title: Implement WorkflowContext struct with journal replay
description: Implement WorkflowContext that holds journal reference, instance ID, and implements DurableContext. Integrates journal replay per ADR-005 algorithm: check journal for cached result, execute if not found, journal the result.

preconditions: P1: WorkflowContext requires valid journal handle
P2: Instance ID must be unique per workflow execution
postconditions: Q1: run() checks journal before execution
Q2: run() journals result after successful execution
Q3: All state operations are atomic with journal write
invariants: I1: Journal is flushed before any method returns (ADR-005 durability guarantee)
I2: Replay always starts from journal.len()

title: Implement state management (get_state/set_state)
description: Implement get_state and set_state with journal integration. get_state checks journal entry for cached value. set_state journals the state change. Uses MessagePack serialization.

preconditions: P1: Key must be non-empty string
P2: Value must be valid MessagePack
postconditions: Q1: get_state returns cached value if journaled
Q2: set_state persists to journal before returning

title: Implement signaling (wait_for_signal/signal)
description: Implement wait_for_signal and signal. Signals are named channels with payload. wait_for_signal suspends until signal arrives. Uses in-memory signal registry with journal backup.

preconditions: P1: Signal name must be non-empty
P2: Payload must be valid Vec<u8>
postconditions: Q1: signal() stores payload for name
Q2: wait_for_signal() returns when signal is available

title: Implement sleep with journal replay support
description: Implement sleep(duration) that suspends until duration passes. On replay, if sleep was already completed (fire_at < now), return immediately. Journal Sleep entries with fire_at timestamp.

preconditions: P1: Duration must be <= 24 hours (ADR-004 max wait time)
postconditions: Q1: sleep returns after duration expires
Q2: On replay with completed sleep, returns immediately
invariants: I1: Sleep is journaled with fire_at timestamp

title: Implement rand_uuid for WorkflowContext
description: Implement rand_uuid() using uuid::Uuid::new_v4. Must be deterministic for replay - journal the UUID so replay returns same value. This is critical for idempotency keys.

postconditions: Q1: Returns valid Uuid
Q2: Same step replay returns same UUID
invariants: I1: UUID is journaled with Run entry

title: Create context module and export types
description: Create wtf-core/src/context.rs that exports DurableContext, RunFuture, DurableFuture, WorkflowContext. Update lib.rs to re-export context types.

postconditions: Q1: All context types publicly exported from wtf-core
